```
timeline.detail:
The "Create new user" form is displayed on the Basics tab 
within the Azure portal. Four tabs are visible at the top: Basics, 
Properties, Assignments, Review + create. The Identity section contains 
empty fields for User principal name (with @RudolfZhangoutlook.on... 
domain dropdown), Mail nickname (with "Derive from user principal name" 
checked), Display name, and Password (with "Auto-generate password" 
checked). Account enabled is toggled on. A "Give feedback to Microsoft" 
survey popup is overlaid in the top-right corner. Breadcrumb reads: 
Home > 默认目录 | Users > Create new user.
```

> **Note:** Each Copilot SDK + Playwright MCP session opens a new browser tab, so a live "inspect" would show a blank page, not this state. The above is from the latest captured screenshot which reflects the actual browser state at step completion.
